title: pilosella obscura subsp. aquilonaris
intro: Pilosella obscura subsp. aquilonaris, also known as a subspecies of the plant Pilosella obscura, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential medicinal plant. The health benefits of Pilosella obscura subsp. aquilonaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some traditional medicine systems, it is used to treat various ailments.
